name: BIMINI CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, INC.
summary: Bimini Capital Management, Inc. is a Maryland-based specialty finance company operating in two segments: investing in Agency mortgage-backed securities (MBS) and Orchid Island Capital common stock through its subsidiary Royal Palm Capital, LLC; and serving as external manager of Orchid Island Capital, Inc. through Bimini Advisors, LLC. Agency MBS include pass-through certificates, CMOs, IOs, IIOs, and POs guaranteed by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, or Ginnie Mae, backed by single-family residential mortgage loans.

products.name: Agency MBS Investment Portfolio
products.description: Investing in pass-through and structured Agency MBS guaranteed by GSEs, funded via repurchase agreements on a leveraged basis.

products.name: External Management of Orchid Island Capital
products.description: Bimini Advisors provides day-to-day management, officers, and support personnel to Orchid Island Capital for a tiered monthly management fee.

partnerships.description: Bimini Advisors serves as external manager of Orchid under a management agreement with tiered fees based on Orchid's equity.
Agreement to purchase 80% of TJIM, a registered investment adviser with ~$1.6 billion AUM, expected to close Q2 2026.
